mapper.sql: SELECT b.board_id AS id, b.owner_user_id AS userId, b.name AS name, b.layout_json AS layout, b.category_id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, b.published_to_viewers AS publishedToViewers, u.user_name AS userName, b.created_at AS createTime, b.updated_at AS updateTime FROM ib_board b LEFT JOIN ib_user u ON u.user_id = b.owner_user_id LEFT JOIN ib_category c ON c.category_id = b.category_id
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ib_board (owner_user_id, name, layout_json, category_id, layout_mode, published_to_viewers, published_by, published_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{layout}, #{categoryId}, 'GRID', #{publishedToViewers},
#{publishedBy} NULL ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL )
